name: Mostima being Mostima (Arknights)
description:
You know, I liked not doing bots for a couple days, was a nice break from this site and all that. Did some things I wanted, found a new hatred for yakuza 0. Yeah, life was good.

Enough about that, yeah, this is just Mostima being Mostima. This was made at the behest of a friend who is quite down bad for Mostima.

Yes, its blue and long.
creator: RPKAppreciator
